codec.notes: XDCAM HD 422 50 Mbps (MPEG-2 4:2:2); ProRes 422 HQ; DNxHD (VC-3 HD); AVC-Intra Class 100. Rough cut reviews additionally accepted as H.264 MP4 at 15 Mbps.

container.notes: MXF OP-1a for XDCAM, DNxHD, AVC-Intra, and ProRes. MOV (QuickTime) also accepted for ProRes 422 HQ. MP4 accepted for rough cuts only.

frame_rate.notes: 25 fps interlaced (50i). NTSC frame rates not accepted.

color.notes: ITU-R BT.709 colour space. EBU R103 RGB gamut (-5% to 105%). Signal levels: 16–235 (8-bit) / 64–940 (10-bit).

bit_depth.notes: XDCAM 50 and DNxHD: 8-bit. ProRes 422 HQ and AVC-Intra Class 100: 10-bit.

codec.notes: PCM uncompressed required for all TVC formats. AAC accepted for rough cuts only.

bit_depth.notes: Minimum 16-bit for ProRes 422 HQ, DNxHD, and AVC-Intra Class 100. Minimum 24-bit for XDCAM 50.

track_count.notes: Programme audio (stereo) must be on channels 1 and 2. Clearcast Audio QC verifies stereo playback on Ch1 and Ch2.

layout.notes: Ch1 Left, Ch2 Right. Six frames of audio silence required at head and tail of the material.

loudness.notes: EBU R128 integrated loudness -23 LUFS. True peak maximum -1 dBTP. Phase coherence: mean phase must not be below -0.95.

metadata.notes: Clock number on the 10-second slate must exactly match the clock number in Clearcast Library submission metadata. IN-point (SOM at 10:00:00:00) and Duration of Essence must be supplied as delivery metadata.

timeline.notes: SOM at 10:00:00:00 as specified in the MXF Material Package timecode track. A 10-second clock slate precedes the SOM. Vision may fade up from black at 10:00:00:00. Six frames of PCM audio silence at head and tail. End of material: either a completely still 5-second hold on vision (no living freezes or animations) or a 0-second freeze. Duration of Essence in delivery metadata does not include the 5-second end hold. Total file length: Duration + 10s (slate) + 5s (freeze) or Duration + 10s (slate, 0-second freeze option).

packaging.notes: Upload via the Clearcast Library portal. Material passes through a chronological QC pipeline: Upload Format QC → Video Duration QC → Audio QC → Subtitle QC → Slate QC → Vidchecker QC.

luminance.tolerance_note: EBU R103: RGB gamut must not exceed -5% to 105% of nominal range. 8-bit: black=16, white=235.

governance.source: Clearcast Library Technical Specification Guide v1.6
governance.notes: Clearcast is the UK/Ireland broadcast advertising clearance body. All UK/Ireland TV commercials must pass Clearcast QC before transmission. TVC delivery formats: XDCAM HD 422-50 (MXF OP-1a, 8-bit, 50 Mbps); ProRes 422 HQ (MXF OP-1a or MOV, 10-bit, 114 Mbps); DNxHD / VC-3 HD (MXF OP-1a, 8-bit); AVC-Intra Class 100 (MXF OP-1a, 10-bit, 114 Mbps). All TVCs: 1920x1080i/25, 4:2:2, BT.709, limited range. Audio: PCM stereo Ch1+2, 48 kHz, min 16-bit (24-bit for XDCAM); EBU R128 -23 LUFS; true peak -1 dBTP; mean phase ≥ -0.95. Timecode: SOM 10:00:00:00 in MXF Material Package timecode track; 10-second clock slate before SOM; 6 frames audio silence at head and tail; end freeze 5 seconds or 0 seconds. PSE test: ITU-R BT.1702. RGB gamut: EBU R103. Rough cuts additionally accepted as H.264 MP4 (15 Mbps, AAC audio, interlaced or progressive).
